full_video_sequence_variations.purpose: Alternative complete movement structures for Grok image-to-video fashion generation using a base image.
full_video_sequence_variations.selection_instruction: Use only sequence_05_real_person_idle_to_presenting. Do not combine it with another sequence.

variations.name: Real person idle to presenting
variations.best_for: Making AI-generated women look more human and less staged.

timeline.action: The subject starts slightly idle, as if she was not perfectly posed. She breathes naturally and shifts weight subtly.
She notices the camera naturally and adjusts her posture slightly.
She gives a tiny soft smile, then lets it fade.
She steps forward once and lightly touches the existing outfit fabric.
She releases the fabric and rests one hand naturally on the waist.
She makes a small side-to-side body movement, very subtle and casual.
She looks slightly to one side, then back toward the camera, ending naturally without freezing.

variations.expression_behavior: Human and inconsistent in a realistic way: neutral, faint smile, neutral, slight attention shift.
